Enum Class TaskTypeExtended

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<TaskTypeExtended>
grafioschtrader.types.TaskTypeExtended
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBaseEnum<Byte>, ITaskType, Serializable, Comparable<TaskTypeExtended>, Constable
public enum TaskTypeExtended extends Enum<TaskTypeExtended> implements ITaskType

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ALGO_ALARM_INDICATOR_EVALUATION
    Evaluates indicator-based algo alert conditions (MA crossing, RSI, expression)
    CHECK_INACTIVE_SECURITY_AND_DIVIDEND_INTEREST
    Integrity check over held positions
    CHECK_RELOAD_SECURITY_ADJUSTED_HISTORICAL_PRICES
    When a split is added it may take some days until the data provider reflect that in adjusted historical prices
    COPY_SOURCE_ACCOUNT_TO_DEMO_ACCOUNTS
    Copy the source tenant to the demo accounts
    CREATE_STOCK_EXCHANGE_CALENDAR_BY_INDEX
    Creates the calendar for stock exchanged by a mayor index
    CURRENCY_CHANGED_ON_TENANT_AND_PORTFOLIO
    Changed currency of tenant and portfolio it needs a creation of currencies and possible recreation of holing tables
    CURRENCY_CHANGED_ON_TENANT_OR_PORTFOLIO
    Creation of currencies and possible recreation of holing tables
    GTNET_SECURITY_IMPORT_POSITIONS
    Imports securities from GTNet peers for GTNetSecurityImpHead positions
    HOLDINGS_SECURITY_REBUILD
    The splits of security has changed, rebuild for all clients its security holdings
    LOAD_ECB_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATES
    Loading historical exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB).
    LOAD_EMPTY_CURRENCYPAIR_HISTORYQUOTES
    Load EOD data of an empty currency pair
    MONITOR_HISTORICAL_PRICE_DATA
    Checks whether a connector for historical price data may no longer be working.
    MONITOR_INTRADAY_PRICE_DATA
    Checks whether a connector for intraday price data may no longer be working.
    PERIODICALLY_DIVIDEND_UPDATE_CHECK
    Traces possible new dividends of the instruments through the connectors
    PRICE_AND_SPLIT_DIV_CALENDAR_UPDATE_THRU
    Historical and intraday price update with price data quality update
    REBUILD_HOLDING_CASHACCOUNT_DEPOSIT_OUT_DATED_CURRENCY_PAIR_PRICE
    Changed historical currency prices may influence the deposit holdings since it depends on it
    REBUILD_HOLDINGS_ALL_OR_SINGLE_TENANT
    Rebuild Holdings for all tenants, normally one one when the database was created from export
    RESET_CONNECTOR_RETRY_COUNTERS
    Resets retry counters (history and intra) for connector(s) on active instruments.
    SECURITY_DIVIDEND_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY
    Dividend connector has changed -> Read dividends
    SECURITY_LOAD_HISTORICAL_INTRA_PRICE_DATA
    Load or reload security price historical data
    SECURITY_SPLIT_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY
    Data connector for splits has been changed or triggered by a split calendar event. -> Read splits
    STANDING_ORDER_EXECUTION
    Processes due standing orders, creating transactions for the previous day
    UDF_USER_0_FILL_PERSISTENT_FIELDS_WITH_VALUES
    Stores the determined values of the user-defined fields of user 0.
    UNOFFICIAL_CREATE_TRANSACTION_FROM_DIVIDENDS_TABLE
     
    UPD_V_0_11_0
    ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

      Historical and intraday price update with price data quality update

    • SECURITY_DIVIDEND_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY

      public static final TaskTypeExtended SECURITY_DIVIDEND_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY
      Dividend connector has changed -> Read dividends

    • SECURITY_SPLIT_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY

      public static final TaskTypeExtended SECURITY_SPLIT_UPDATE_FOR_SECURITY
      Data connector for splits has been changed or triggered by a split calendar event. -> Read splits

    • CURRENCY_CHANGED_ON_TENANT_OR_PORTFOLIO

      public static final TaskTypeExtended CURRENCY_CHANGED_ON_TENANT_AND_PORTFOLIO
      Changed currency of tenant and portfolio it needs a creation of currencies and possible recreation of holing tables

      Load or reload security price historical data

      public static final TaskTypeExtended HOLDINGS_SECURITY_REBUILD
      The splits of security has changed, rebuild for all clients its security holdings

      Changed historical currency prices may influence the deposit holdings since it depends on it

    • CHECK_RELOAD_SECURITY_ADJUSTED_HISTORICAL_PRICES

      public static final TaskTypeExtended CHECK_RELOAD_SECURITY_ADJUSTED_HISTORICAL_PRICES
      When a split is added it may take some days until the data provider reflect that in adjusted historical prices

    • REBUILD_HOLDINGS_ALL_OR_SINGLE_TENANT

      public static final TaskTypeExtended REBUILD_HOLDINGS_ALL_OR_SINGLE_TENANT
      Rebuild Holdings for all tenants, normally one one when the database was created from export

      Copy the source tenant to the demo accounts

      Creates the calendar for stock exchanged by a mayor index

      Traces possible new dividends of the instruments through the connectors

    • CHECK_INACTIVE_SECURITY_AND_DIVIDEND_INTEREST

      public static final TaskTypeExtended CHECK_INACTIVE_SECURITY_AND_DIVIDEND_INTEREST
      Integrity check over held positions

    • LOAD_ECB_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATES

      public static final TaskTypeExtended LOAD_ECB_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RATES
      Loading historical exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB). Should be done daily if possible but not necessarily on weekends.

    • MONITOR_HISTORICAL_PRICE_DATA

      public static final TaskTypeExtended MONITOR_HISTORICAL_PRICE_DATA
      Checks whether a connector for historical price data may no longer be working.

    • MONITOR_INTRADAY_PRICE_DATA

      public static final TaskTypeExtended MONITOR_INTRADAY_PRICE_DATA
      Checks whether a connector for intraday price data may no longer be working.

    • valueOf

      public static TaskTypeExtended valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
